Prefer ambiguity-preserving checks when the spec or timing is uncertain.

The value of q is right-shifted by 1 bit using the >> operator: q <= (q >> 1).\nThe most significant bit (q[7]) of the register is assigned the value of the input signal (d): q[7] <= d.\n\nGive me the complete code."
